title: CLI umbrella (was jssm#619)
manager: The umbrella for the whole CLI verb surface — the coordinating issue that keeps init, convert, playground, repl, lsp, lint, format, typegen, and the rest coherent as one tool with consistent flags and output conventions. A CLI grows into a mess without a plan for its verb vocabulary; this is that plan, cross-linked to the era umbrellas that schedule each verb.
